text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have plans with Maruzensky to look at cleats together, but she's a
little late...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After failing to reach her by phone, I decide to head to her place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Uh, coming! Goodness, another package?! Sorry! Just a min—hyaaah?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a loud noise followed by a shout, so I instinctively open the
door...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inside, I see Maruzensky buried under a pile of boxes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sorry for startling you like that.
choice_data_list: What was up with all the boxes?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I love shopping online, and they send each thing in a separate
cardboard box, you know? I didn't even realize they'd piled up so
high.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I haven't cleaned up at all! My whole room's a mess of boxes!
choice_data_list: I take it you don't clean often?
I take it you don't clean often?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well... I wouldn't say that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I always tidy up pretty well when guests come over. I even get all the nooks and crannies.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But when no one visits, I can't seem to find the energy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I dropped my phone in between the boxes this morning. Then you got
there while I was still trying to look for it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I dropped my phone in between the boxes this morning. Then you got
there while I was still trying to look for it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm super late, and you witnessed the mess I'm living in. Sigh... I really should try to clean more often.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wha?! You'll help? You sure?
choice_data_list: You'll find the energy if it's the two of us, right?
You'll find the energy if it's the two of us, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, with you there, I'll be all that and a bag of chips!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, with you there, I'll be all that and a bag of chips!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ I appreciate it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ I appreciate it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to her place and spend the next few hours cleaning up
the tremendous number of cardboard boxes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! My room looks so much better!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! My room looks so much better!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Dinner's on me. Pick anything you want—don't be shy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll even make something from scratch if you want. I may not seem it,
but I'm a great cook!
choice_data_list: Oh, do you cook a lot?
Oh, do you cook a lot?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Um, about as much as I clean. I just can't be bothered when it's just
me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But today is different. You're here, so I'm super motivated! Japanese,
French, Chinese, whatever you want. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But today is different. You're here, so I'm super motivated! Japanese,
French, Chinese, whatever you want. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going all out, so I hope you brought an appetite!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After shopping for the ingredients, Maruzensky prepares a wonderful
dinner. She expertly prepares and dishes out plate after plate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks great and tastes even better. Even a professional chef would
be impressed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was nice. Did you like it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was nice. Did you like it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make up for the disappointing day this turned out to be. I
hope it wasn't too much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make up for the disappointing day this turned out to be. I
hope it wasn't too much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And it looks like I succeeded, so that's a relief! Now there's just...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Making sure I don't let those boxes pile up again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Though that's easier said than done—it really is a pain. Cleaning is
such a hassle.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I don't hate it or anything, but it's not the same as running or
dancing—I can't get into it on my own.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! How about you stop by every now and then to check up on me?
Isn't that a good idea?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Ah! How about you stop by every now and then to check up on me?
Isn't that a good idea?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Really? How can I thank you? ...Right, how about more home
cooking? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Since you'll be coming over to enjoy my food...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Since you'll be coming over to enjoy my food...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be motivated to keep my room tidy, and we can enjoy eating
together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is the best. The motivation, sure, but food will taste so much better now that I'm not eating alone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: My worries are solved, and I have something to look forward to! Thank you, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: My worries are solved, and I have something to look forward to! Thank you, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll be heading home now.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know, cleaning up and eating together...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
These are incredibly simple things, but I'm looking forward to them so
much, I can barely stand it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I shouldn't be this happy needing you to check up on the state
of my room.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, that's it! Maybe you should move in next door. Then you won't
have to commute all the way to my place. Right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I think the room next door is empty. I'll look into it!
choice_data_list: Uh, I think that might be a bit much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aw, that's too bad. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're so cute when you get all flustered!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're so cute when you get all flustered!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, jokes aside... I'd be happy to have you over anytime.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Even if it's every day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she gets in her car and drives off, I can tell from her smirk that she
was teasing me.
